# ASTRA Villa Property

> Indonesia's AI-powered real estate platform for buying, selling, renting, and investing in villas, apartments, land, and commercial property across Bali, Jakarta, and emerging Southeast Asian markets.

ASTRA Villa Property combines an AI property search engine, verified listings, virtual tours, automated valuations, fractional/tokenized investment, escrow-backed transactions, and agent CRM tooling into a single platform. Content is available in Indonesian (id) and English (en). Base URL: https://astravilla.com

## Core Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, featured properties, AI search, investment hotspots
- [About](/about): Company mission, vision, and platform capabilities
- [Contact](/contact): Enterprise support center and ticket intake
- [Properties](/properties): Full property search with filters (location, price, type)
- [For Sale](/dijual): Properties listed for sale across Indonesia
- [For Rent](/disewa): Rental properties and long-stay villas
- [Provinces](/province-properties): Directory of properties by Indonesian province
- [Location Map](/location): Geospatial heatmap of listings and investment areas
- [Area Guides](/area-guides): Neighborhood intelligence for popular districts
- [Advanced Search](/search-advanced): Multi-criteria property search
- [AI Search](/ai-search): Natural-language property discovery assistant
- [Investment](/investment): Investment opportunities, ROI analysis, hotspots

## Content

- [Blog](/blog): Market intelligence, investment strategy, technology insights
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at ASTRA Villa Property
- [Press](/press): Media coverage and press resources

## Legal & Support

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Platform terms and user obligations
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Data collection and processing practices
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Cookie categories and usage
- [Cookie Preferences](/cookie-preferences): Manage cookie consent categories
- [Compliance](/compliance): Regulatory compliance and licensing

## Optional

- [Add Property](/add-property): Listing submission (authenticated users)
